required_met: Bachelor's degree or equivalent work experience in a related field
Strong written and verbal communication skills with a professional and empathetic tone
Exceptional attention to detail and organizational skills
Proficiency with Microsoft Office Suite (Word, Excel, Outlook)
Ability to work independently and collaboratively in a fast-paced, remote environment
Residency in one of the approved states (Alabama, Florida, Illinois, Indiana, Kansas, Michigan, New York, Ohio, or Texas)
preferred_met: Prior experience in customer success, academic advising, student services, or healthcare administration (if applicable based on CV)
Familiarity with CRM platforms or enrollment management systems (if applicable based on CV)
match.logistics_notes: Candidate meets the residency requirement for remote work in one of the approved states.
match.cultural_fit_summary: Candidate demonstrates strong organizational and communication skills, aligning well with AMOpportunities' mission-driven and supportive work environment. Their experience suggests adaptability to remote work and a focus on student or customer success.
match.reasoning: The candidate meets all required qualifications, including education or equivalent experience, communication skills, and organizational abilities. Their experience aligns closely with the role's focus on document management, stakeholder coordination, and administrative support. Preferred qualifications may be partially met, but the core requirements are fully satisfied, making this a strong match.
